full_text:
Mao Jie (Xiaoxian) 毛玠 (孝先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mao Jie (毛玠), styledXiaoxian (孝先), was born in Pingqiu county, Chenliu commandery (Presently Feng Qui, He Nan Province). Served as Military Aide to Cao Cao. Later Staff Supervisor, then Naval Commander. Mao Jie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Mao Jie lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
